# Phase 1: Data Migration

**Status:** Pending
**File:** `phases/phase_1_migration.md`

---

## Detailed Objective

Migrate data from legacy database to new schema.

## Acceptance Gates

- [ ] Gate 1: All records migrated.
- [ ] Gate 2: Data integrity verified.

## Tasks

### [ ] 1 Export Legacy Data

  - [ ] 1.1 Connect to legacy database and export tables.

### [ ] 2 Transform Schema

  - [ ] 2.1 Map legacy columns to new schema.
  - [ ] 2.3 Validate transformation rules against sample data.

### [ ] 4 Import to New Database

  - [ ] 4.1 Load transformed data into new schema.
  - [ ] 4.2 Run integrity checks.
